positive: A stylized illustration of a magnificent, bioluminescent forest scene viewed from above (overhead perspective). The centerpiece is a winding, glowing path leading through oversized, stylized tropical foliage and giant, luminous mushrooms. Use a vibrant, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and neon cyan accents. The style should be modern, graphic, and flat vector art mixed with subtle glowing gradients, evoking a sense of magical wonder and serene depth. Strong, crisp silhouettes are essential, perfect for apparel printing. Center composition, volumetric lighting, high saturation, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, watermark, text, low quality, poor anatomy, bad hands, grainy, grayscale, monochrome, logo, signature, copyright, bokeh, deep shadows
